name: Effluent licence
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: EMA licence required by industrial and mining operations discharging effluent, with quarterly waste-management reporting.

name: ESIA certificate
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: Environmental and Social Impact Assessment certificate issued by EMA, required before implementing projects in EMA-listed categories.

name: Head grade
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Metal content of ore fed to the plant, driving recovered output.

name: Recovery
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Share of contained metal actually recovered by the plant.

name: Stoping / development
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Ore extraction (stoping) versus tunnelling to access ore (development); costed separately.

name: Stripping ratio
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Waste moved per tonne of ore in open-pit mining.

name: Custom milling
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Processing of small-scale miners' ore at a third-party mill for a fee or share.

name: Assay
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Laboratory determination of metal content used in settlements and plant control.

name: Hoisting / tramming
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Moving ore from underground to surface and around the mine; key cost activities.

name: Claim / mining title
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The registered right to prospect or mine a defined area; title administration is a declared research gap in this seed.
